body:
# 4chan Sound Player

Installation:
* Chrome: [Install](http://github.com/ms11/4chanSoundPlayer/raw/master/4chanSP.user.js "4chanSoundPlayer") the script
* Firefox: [Install](https://addons.mozilla.org/hu/firefox/addon/scriptish/ "Scriptish") Scriptish, and then [Install](http://github.com/ms11/4chanSoundPlayer/raw/master/4chanSP.user.js "4chanSoundPlayer") the script. (Other Firefox extensions (e.g.: GreaseMonkey) where not tested, although they could be usable, but using Scriptish is recommended)
name: 4chanSoundPlayer
